---
title: "Hot Hits de Portugal"
format:
    dashboard:
        theme: cosmo
        logo: "data/img/logo.png"
        orientation: columns
---
## Column {width="35%"}
asjdaskfm coluna 1

```{ojs}
//| output: false
console.log("ola")



```

## Column {width="65%"}

### Row {height="10%"}
dsfdsfd coluna 2 linha 1

### Row {height="70%"}
faskfdk coluna 2 linha 2

### Row {height="20%"}
asfnsjkdgfs coluna 2 linha 3
